rites.title: Ihram & Intention (Niyyah)
rites.summary: Enter the state of ihram and make the intention for Umrah.
steps: Perform ghusl or wudu and wear the two white ihram garments (for men).
At the miqat, make the intention for Umrah in your heart.

dua.translation: Here I am, O Allah, for Umrah.

rites.scholarSource: PLACEHOLDER — pending scholar verification (PRD §14 #1). Ref: Sahih Muslim, Book of Hajj (Kitab al-Hajj).

rites.title: Tawaf (7 circuits)
rites.summary: Circle the Ka'bah seven times, beginning and ending at the Black Stone.
steps: Begin at the Black Stone, facing it; say 'Bismillah, Allahu akbar'.
Circle the Ka'bah seven times counter-clockwise, keeping it on your left.
Where possible, men perform raml (a brisk pace) in the first three circuits.

dua.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
dua.transliteration: Rabbanā ātinā fi'd-dunyā ḥasanatan wa fi'l-ākhirati ḥasanatan wa qinā ʿadhāba'n-nār
dua.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

rites.scholarSource: PLACEHOLDER — pending scholar verification (PRD §14 #1). Ref: Qur'an 2:201; Sahih al-Bukhari, Book of Hajj.
